title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that creates knowledge graphs from code bases without using RAG, reducing token overhead while maintaining accuracy. It addresses memory constraints when working with large codebases in Claude Code.
